description: Machine-checked target-preserving Ursell leaf summation for polymer systems with holes. The repository contains the integrated article, Lean 4 theorem aliases, exact proof-source and dependency locks, a machine-readable proof DAG, safe clean-room archive verification, SPDX 2.3 and CycloneDX 1.5 SBOMs, deterministic build information, and in-toto/SLSA provenance. Code and tooling are AGPL-3.0-or-later; original documentation and figures are CC BY 4.0.
title: Marked Rooted-Tree Summation for Polymer Cluster Expansions with Holes: A Lean 4 Formalization
